claims.text: The council maintenance report says the bridge inspection was due last March.
The repair budget was cut by 12 percent this year.
The council says the bridge is totally fine.
The trial enrolled 480 patients across six hospitals.
The primary endpoint was progression-free survival.
Electricity prices increased by 18 percent over two years.
The tax office estimate is 1.4 billion dollars over four years.
